name: Datto BCDR
description: Integrates with Datto Unified Continuity REST API for BCDR device management, agent monitoring, backup verification, and screenshot verification across the Datto SIRIS, ALTO, and endpoint backup platforms

actions.name: List BCDR Devices
actions.description: Retrieve all Datto BCDR devices (SIRIS, ALTO) registered to the partner account with status and configuration

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of devices to return

actions.name: Get Device Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific BCDR device including agents, storage, and backup status

parameters.name: serialNumber
parameters.description: Serial number of the Datto device

actions.name: List Device Agents
actions.description: Retrieve all agents (protected machines) configured on a specific BCDR device

parameters.name: serialNumber
parameters.description: Serial number of the Datto device

actions.name: Get Agent Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific agent including backup history, volumes, and screenshot verification status

parameters.name: serialNumber
parameters.description: Serial number of the Datto device

actions.name: List Device Alerts
actions.description: Retrieve alerts for a specific BCDR device including backup failures, verification issues, and connectivity problems

parameters.name: serialNumber
parameters.description: Serial number of the Datto device

actions.name: List Share Agents
actions.description: Retrieve all NAS share backup agents configured on a BCDR device

parameters.name: serialNumber
parameters.description: Serial number of the Datto device
